title: coleus geminatus
intro: Coleus geminatus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus geminatus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Coleus geminatus plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
